/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vislab_geometry_test.dir/face_normals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vislab_geometry_test.dir/lines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vislab_geometry_test.dir/points.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vislab_geometry_test.dir/surfaces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vislab_geometry_test.dir/vertex_normals.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/vislab_geometry_test  ../../../lib/libvislab_geometry.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libvislab_core.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
